content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style issuer credit assessment for Meridian Freight, dated 2025-11-13 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. A marginally more conservative read of the same leverage and coverage inputs places Meridian at BB (high), the top high-yield notch. The gap to the other anchor is a single notch, but because it straddles the investment-grade / high-yield boundary it changes the issuer's eligibility bucket.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative — not Morningstar DBRS data.
